title: FallbackPolicy
description: Behavior when ZK circuit is unavailable for a predicate requirement

REQUIRE_PREDICATE.description: ZK proof is mandatory; reject the presentation if no compatible circuit is available
REQUIRE_PREDICATE.use_case: High-privacy deployments where unlinkability is a hard requirement
REQUIRE_PREDICATE.warning: Must only be used when supported_circuits is non-empty

ACCEPT_RAW.description: Fall back to requesting the raw claim value if no ZK circuit is available
ACCEPT_RAW.use_case: Default behavior; gradual ZK rollout with backward compatibility
ACCEPT_RAW.privacy_note: Raw claim values are disclosed to the verifier

DENY.description: Reject the presentation outright if the predicate cannot be satisfied
DENY.use_case: Strict compliance contexts where both ZK and raw disclosure are unacceptable
